originalTitle: PufferLib - the hard problem in RL
title: Investigating On-Policy Assumptions in Policy Gradient Algorithms
summary: Worked through the mathematical derivation of vanilla policy gradients to understand why they require on-policy data. Identified that the core issue is the value function's dependence on current policy, not the policy gradient itself. Conducted experiments to separate value and policy learning, but found challenges in getting baseline performance without LSTM.
